nasb.text: Then Philip opened his mouth, and beginning from this Scripture he preached Jesus to him.

esv.text: Then Philip opened his mouth, and beginning with this Scripture he told him the good news about Jesus.

cnv.text: 腓利就開口，從這段經文開始，向他傳講耶穌。

ccb.text: 腓利就从这段经文入手向他传耶稣的福音。

csbs.text: 腓利就开口，从这一段经文开始，向他传讲耶稣的福音。
